model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants to click on the "Sign In" button.
Looking at the image, the "Sign In" button is a blue button in the center of the white card.

Coordinates:
The button's bounding box is roughly:
left: 354
top: 621
right: 650
bottom: 683

Center:
x = (354 + 650) / 2 = 502
y = (621 + 683) / 2 = 652
